textPlain: Looks like the source the article is based around is https://www.diyphotography.net/develop-film-at-home-with-a-j..., which itself is a write-up of https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5_Oja2mpYqg.
it's unfortunate that you can develop film even with something like coffee, but for the fixing step there aren't any similarly "not purely chemical" options
Can U still drink the Jägerbomb after developing?
If you like it mixed with washing soda maybe? There's probably some runoff from from chemicals  though so the drink may be too spicy
